body.title: Pre-existing granny dispatch/cascade/e2e test failures (env-dependent)
body.description:
**Pre-existing at HEAD (verified 2026-07-07 via a clean worktree during T-granny-builder-load-balancing — NOT caused by that change).** 13 granny tests fail in-session: tests/granny/test_cascade.py (4: builder_ticket_routes_to_cc_when_cascade_active, _routes_to_ds_when_no_cascade, _stays_with_ds_when_master_exists, cascade_worker_field_updated), test_e2e_dispatch_smoke.py (7: envelope/handshake/one-at-a-time), test_exact_match.py (2: run_once defers/dispatches). Symptom: `_dispatch_bus`/`setstatus` called 0 times (assert 0 == 1) — run_once isn't dispatching under the in-session mocks. Likely a missing setup (availability dir / DB / IMAP mock) these tests assume; may pass in CI/overnight.

**Task:** determine whether these are hermetic-setup gaps (fix the fixtures) or genuinely env-dependent (mark/xfail with reason). Get a clean green or an honest skip.

**Affected files:** tests/granny/test_cascade.py, test_e2e_dispatch_smoke.py, test_exact_match.py (+ maybe a shared granny conftest).

**Scope boundary:** the granny dispatch test fixtures only.

**Test plan:** the three files run green (or explicitly xfail/skip with a named reason) in-session.

**intention:** I intend that the granny dispatch tests give a trustworthy signal in-session instead of silent pre-existing red.

## Pre-computed constraints (auto-stamped at add time)
[hard_block] ⛔ NO SQLITE. EVER. POSTGRES OR FLAT-FILE ONLY. See banner at top of this file. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[hard_block] Log every state change and every interface crossing. State changes: ticket status — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] No TheIgors imports. UnseenUniversity must be portable without TheIgors present. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] No live keys or passwords in source. `.env` is gitignored. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] `pip install -e .` must succeed at all times (even with empty stubs). — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] Canonical dev-process memory — one home, no exceptions. Every dev-process artifact — — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] device.py and shim.py are the design center. Every component inherits from — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] bus/ owns comms:// routing. Nothing outside bus/ speaks to IMAP directly. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] skeleton/ owns the MCP aggregator and flat-file registry. No Postgres dependency. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] devices/ contains one subdirectory per device; each is independently deployable. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] `~/.unseen_university/logs/<device>/<stream>/` is the canonical log hierarchy — — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] Every ticket closes proven, or declares itself unproven — no discriminator. A ticket that — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
…and 39 more (lower-severity or capped) — query constraints_get for the full set

## Escalation summary (Aider)
**What was tried:** aider TIMED OUT after 900s
**Where it broke:** aider produced 0 edits
**What now?**

## Update 2026-07-08 (CC.0, surfaced during T-collapse-daemons-to-ground-loop)
Re-confirmed pre-existing at HEAD via a clean detached worktree: tests/granny/test_e2e_dispatch_smoke.py = 7 failed / 1 passed on committed HEAD (so NOT introduced by the daemon-collapse work). Sharper root-cause split:
  - cascade.py (4) + exact_match.py (2): PASS when run in isolation, FAIL only in a batch — a device instantiation (DiagnosticBase.__init__ -> install_stdlib_intercept -> logging.basicConfig(force=True)) removes pytest's caplog handler, so caplog.text is empty and the log-assert fails. Fix = a conftest fixture that preserves/re-adds the caplog handler (or resets root logging) per test — a hermetic-setup gap, NOT a dispatch bug.
  - e2e_dispatch_smoke.py (7): FAILS even in isolation — genuine mock gap; run_once dispatches 0 envelopes under the _StubIMAP + patched _sprint_tickets/is_available setup. Needs the missing setup identified (availability dir / stub wiring), not a caplog fix.
Owner: CC.0 (sole repo editor — mine to fix regardless of originating ticket, per Akien 2026-07-08). Reclaimed from the aider escalation (aider timed out, 0 edits).
body.result: Fixed all 13 env-dependent granny dispatch reds with a shared autouse tests/granny/conftest.py fixture. TICKET ROOT-CAUSE WAS WRONG: the documented caplog/mock-gap split was disproven (cascade+exact_match fail in ISOLATION too, not only batch). Real root: run_once's first line is 'if is_stalled(): return', and is_stalled() reads the real ~/.granny/stall_state.json (module-level stall_state._STATE). These 3 files never redirected that path, so when the operator's granny is parked (this box: stalled=True) run_once returns before dispatch and all _dispatch_bus/_setstatus_direct assertions fail. Fix redirects _STATE/_MRU/_LAST_DISPATCH to per-test tmp. Full tests/granny/ = 101 passed (incl. test_granny_stall.py stalled-path test). Proof cf2415d1 red=AssertionError->green. NOTE surfaced separately: granny is genuinely stalled on this box.
